mapper.select: select session.id as session_id, session.character_id, session.user_role_version_id, message.role as last_message_role, left(replace(replace(message.content, '\r', ' '), '\n', ' '), 80) as last_message_preview, session.update_time from chat_sessions session left join chat_messages message on message.id = ( select max(latest.id) from chat_messages latest where latest.session_id = session.id ) where session.user_id = #{userId} and session.status = 'ACTIVE' order by session.update_time desc, session.id desc
